title.text: Embedding Konveio PDF Documents for Collecting Feedback

description.text: Let stakeholder and users leave comments directly in embedded PDFs

body:0001.text: What is Konveio and how does it integrate with govocal?

body:0002.text: Konveio enables in-document commenting, allowing stakeholders to leave feedback directly within embedded PDFs.

body:0003.text: Integration is available as an add-on feature (not included in all plans).

body:0004.text: One Konveio PDF can be embedded per phase.

body:0005.text: Contact your Government Success Manager to enable this feature and create a Konveio account.

body:0006.text: To learn more about Konveio itself, visit Konveio’s support documentation.

body:0007.text: How to embed a Konveio document in a project phase?

body:0008.text: Upload and configure the document in Konveio

body:0009.text: Generate the embed code from your Konveio dashboard by pressing "share"

body:0011.text: Remove the <iframe ... src=" at the start

body:0012.text: Remove everything after the URL (starting with frameborder=)

body:0013.text: Result should be a clean embed link

body:0015.text: Go to your project in your Go Vocal platform

body:0016.text: In phase settings, choose Collect feedback on a document as the participation method

body:0017.text: Paste your cleaned Konveio embed link in the designated field

body:0019.text: Go to the Phase access and user data tab

body:0020.text: Define who can see or comment on the document

body:0022.text: Save changes and preview the project

body:0023.text: Make sure the document appears correctly and that comments can be added

body:0024.text: How to access feedback from a Konveio document?

body:0025.text: After the phase closes, visit your Konveio dashboard to:

body:0028.text: How to keep Konveio documents visible after the phase ends?

body:0030.text: Turn on Use Content Builder for description

body:0031.text: Use the embed widget to paste the same cleaned Konveio embed link into the description.

body:0032.text: In your Konveio account settings, enable:

body:0034.text: Save changes. Your document will now remain visible with comments but without active participation
